prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为约1945名、1914名、2902名、11475名（2024年因物化必选专业组出现异常低位）、2774名。排除2024年异常值后，近3 年位次在2774–2902区间波动，2025年基准约2774名，整体呈小幅后移趋势；该校在海南省2021–2023年计划均为25人，2024年降至23人，2025年恢复至25人；20 26年计划增至27人，较2025年扩招2人（+8%），扩招有利于降低竞争烈度，位次数字有增大倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国传媒大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学排名2026年第82名，近年排名稳定在82–92区间，属全国知名传媒类顶尖学府；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面，新闻传播学获评A++等级，学科竞争力突出；2026年周期内出现宿舍火灾等校园安全事件，声誉评价转为偏负面，可能对报考热度产生一定抑制。抖音平台综合热度排名第11位（高热），短视频曝光量大，考生关注度持续 较高。历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；新闻传播学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校网络与新媒体、传播学、广告学等招生专业高度对应，对相关方向考 生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播类专业社会热度呈明显劝退态势（2023年），但中国传媒大学作为行业顶尖学府，其新闻传播类专业仍具 品牌效应。计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度偏热，该校相关专业（数字媒体技术、通信工程等）受益。海南省2026年考生总数约78000人（2025年67408人），增幅 约15.7%，竞争加剧；中国传媒大学位于北京，对海南考生具有跨省吸引力；该校在海南省招生人数占比较小（约0.7%–1%），属 外省招生正常比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2774名、2026年扩招2人（+8%）、海南省考生数大幅增加（+15.7%）、抖音高热关注度以及新闻传播学A+学科的品牌效 应。考虑到学校王牌专业吸引力和抖音高热带来的竞争加剧效应，对主值进行小幅下调修正。预测2026年最低位次约2877名，区间2377–3377名。

- 传播学

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2877名，区间2377–3377名。位次在区间下限（2377名）附近可重点冲刺一档新闻传播类王牌专业（网络与新媒体、广告学、传播学）；位次在预测值（2877名）附近 建议以二档数字媒体技术、通信工程等为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（3377名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时可争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were approximately 1945, 1914, 2902, 11475 (2024 saw an abnormal low due to a subject group requiring physics and chemistry), and 2774. Excluding the 2024 anomaly, the rankings over the past three years fluctuated between 2774 and 2902, with a baseline of about 2774 in 2025, showing a slight backward trend. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan was 25 students from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 23 in 2024, and recovered to 25 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increased to 27 students, an expansion of 2 students (+8%) compared to 2025, which helps reduce competition intensity and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Communication University of China is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 82nd, with a stable range of 82–92 in recent years, making it a nationally renowned top-tier media institution. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was relatively positive, with Journalism and Communication rated A++, highlighting strong disciplinary competitiveness. In the 2026 cycle, campus safety incidents such as a dormitory fire occurred, turning the reputation evaluation somewhat negative, which may suppress application enthusiasm. On the Douyin platform, its comprehensive popularity ranked 11th (high heat), with high short video exposure and sustained high attention from candidates. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of a cutoff for this university. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (national top-tier), highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Network and New Media, Communication, and Advertising, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors has shown a clear discouraging trend (2023), but as the top institution in the industry, Communication University of China's Journalism and Communication majors still have brand effects. Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are socially hot, and the university's related majors (Digital Media Technology, Communication Engineering, etc.) benefit. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Hainan Province is about 78,000 (67,408 in 2025), an increase of about 15.7%, intensifying competition. Located in Beijing, the university has cross-provincial appeal to Hainan candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Hainan is relatively small (about 0.7%–1%), which is a normal proportion for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2774, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 2 students (+8%), the significant increase in Hainan candidates (+15.7%), high Douyin attention, and the brand effect of the A+ Journalism and Communication discipline. Taking into account the attractiveness of the university's flagship majors and the intensified competition from Douyin's high heat, a slight downward adjustment is made to the main value. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2877, with a range of 2377–3377.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2877, range 2377–3377. Candidates near the lower bound of the range (2377) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship Journalism and Communication majors (Network and New Media, Advertising, Communication). Candidates near the predicted value (2877) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Digital Media Technology and Communication Engineering, while also attempting Tier 1 sprints. Candidates near the upper bound of the range (3377) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also aiming for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
